summary: Phase 4 Backend Testing Complete - All endpoints functional

Forgot-password returns generic 200 OK message (anti-enumeration) - correct behavior
Frontend testing was NOT requested for this iteration (backend only)

passed_tests: ✓ Excel Templates: All 5 template download endpoints (users, classes, rooms, subjects, students) return valid .xlsx files

✓ Password Reset: Forgot-password returns 200 OK with generic message (anti-enumeration working)
✓ Password Reset: Token validation endpoint returns 400 for invalid tokens
✓ Password Reset: Reset endpoint returns 400 for invalid tokens
✓ Achievements: Full CRUD working - siswa can submit, edit own unverified achievements
✓ Achievements: Wali kelas can verify achievements
✓ Achievements: Role-based access control working (siswa sees only own)
✓ Extracurriculars: Full CRUD working - admin can create/update/delete
✓ Extracurriculars: Members management working - admin/coach can add students
✓ Extracurriculars: Attendance recording working - coach can record attendance
✓ Extracurriculars: Grades submission working - coach can submit grades with predicates
✓ E-Rapor: Bulk grade submission working - teacher can submit grades for class+subject+semester
✓ E-Rapor: Auto-computation of nilai_akhir and predicate working correctly
✓ E-Rapor: Grade listing with filters working (student_id, class_id, subject_id, semester)
✓ E-Rapor: Full rapor view working - shows student info, class, grades with average
✓ E-Rapor: Permission checks working - siswa sees only own grades, admin sees all
✓ Regression: Phase 1-3.5 endpoints still working (health, schedules, monitoring)
